seo.title: Best Falls Prevention Technology 2026 | Able Care
seo.description: The 2026 buyers guide to falls prevention software. Features, evidence, pricing and fit by segment. An honest comparison of Able Assess, SafelyYou, Nymbl and paper-based methods.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Patient using GripAble grip strength sensor
blocks.headline: Best Falls Prevention Technology 2026
blocks.subtitle: Features, evidence, pricing and fit by segment. An honest comparison.

blocks.heading: Able Assess vs traditional falls prevention methods
blocks.tldr: Fall detection tools like SafelyYou respond after a fall happens. Balance training apps like Nymbl push exercises but do not screen risk. Paper assessments take 20+ minutes, are scored subjectively and rarely feed into a care plan. Able Assess screens every resident objectively in under five minutes, stratifies risk automatically and hands the operator a standardized workflow they can roll out to every site.

values: FDA listed, CE marked, ISO 27001, NICE 2025

blocks.heading: Backed by the research
blocks.pulledStat: Multifactorial falls risk screening outperforms single-test approaches in predicting falls in older adults.

caseStudies.title: Multi-branch Home Care Operator
caseStudies.summary: Caught decline six weeks earlier than their previous process. Reduced hospitalizations across 12 branches.

caseStudies.title: US CCRC Community
caseStudies.summary: Reduced resident falls by 25% in the first year. Protected occupancy and reduced liability exposure.

caseStudies.title: UK Clinical Research Team
caseStudies.summary: Standardized grip strength capture across three trial sites. Improved endpoint signal for GLP-1 muscle loss monitoring.
